title: Start drawing
subtitle: An easy start - pick a canvas and you're drawing in seconds.

options.title: Mandala
options.description: A square, dark canvas with radial symmetry switched on - every stroke blooms into a kaleidoscope.
options.note:
There's an artist in anyone.
This is the best, most fun way to find it.
options.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="8"/><path d="M12 1 V4 M12 20 V23 M1 12 H4 M20 12 H23 M4.2 4.2 L6.3 6.3 M17.7 17.7 L19.8 19.8 M19.8 4.2 L17.7 6.3 M6.3 17.7 L4.2 19.8"/></svg>

options.title: Blank canvas
options.description: Start clean and make it your own. Choose a full-screen canvas or a square 1:1.
options.icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="30" height="30" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="4" y="4" width="16" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M12 9 V15 M9 12 H15"/></svg>

tips.title: Points remember, lines connect
tips.text: The Round brush drops points and weaves a web between nearby ones. Open Connecting (press C) to change how they link.

tips.title: Multiply with symmetry
tips.text: Press Y for Symmetry. Radial turns any doodle into a mandala; Mirror and Tile repeat it across the canvas.

tips.title: Lots of brushes
tips.text: Number keys (1-4, 8, 9) switch brushes - Round, Spray, Marker and more. Each has its own settings (press B).

tips.title: Find everything
tips.text: Press / any time for the full list of shortcuts. You can reopen this Start page from there.
